title: scabiosa communis var. breviseta
intro: Scabiosa communis var. breviseta, also known as the scabiosa or pincushion flower, is a perennial plant species in the borage family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of scabiosa communis var. breviseta include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of scabiosa communis var. breviseta include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
